url.c(3) Library Functions Manual url.c(3)

NAME

url.c - Production-grade URL parsing and validation using PCRE2.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


bool url_is_valid (const char *url)
Fast URL validation using production-grade regex (HTTP/HTTPS/WebSocket/TCP). asciichat_error_t url_parse (const char *url, url_parts_t *parts_out)
Parse HTTP(S), WebSocket, and TCP URL into components. void url_parts_destroy (url_parts_t *parts)
Free parsed URL components. bool url_is_websocket_scheme (const char *scheme)
Check if URL scheme is WebSocket (ws or wss). bool url_is_websocket (const char *url)
Check if a URL string is a valid WebSocket URL. bool url_looks_like_websocket (const char *url)
Quick check if a string is a WebSocket URL. bool url_is_tcp_scheme (const char *scheme)
Check if URL scheme is TCP. bool url_is_tcp (const char *url)
Check if a URL string is a valid TCP URL. bool url_looks_like_tcp (const char *url)
Quick check if a string is a TCP URL.

Detailed Description

Production-grade URL parsing and validation using PCRE2.

Implements robust HTTP(S) URL validation using the production-grade regex by Diego Perini (MIT License), compiled with PCRE2 and JIT for high performance.

Definition in file url.c.
